description: Frozen snapshot of the first profitable SMC configuration using ICT model. This strategy uses H4 bias, M15 setup zone, and M1 entry timing with M15 structural swing points for SL and risk-reward ratio for TP.

description: ICT Silver Bullet strategy: liquidity sweep + displacement + FVG entry during 3 precise time windows (London Open 3-4AM, NY AM 10-11AM, NY PM 2-3PM). Targets opposite liquidity with minimum 1:2 R:R.
